title: Why Your 2025 IT Content Strategy Won't Work in 2026
highlights:
If we look back at 2025, it was the year of the "AI Integration Phase”. For IT service companies, the playbook was to use LLMs to scale production, dominate SEO keywords, and pump out "Ultimate Guides" on everything from Cloud Migration to Cybersecurity.
[...]
The result? The internet is now flooded with technically accurate but generic content. The "Turing Trap" has sprung. Clients can no longer tell if a veteran CTO or a hallucinating bot wrote your whitepaper.
[...]
In 2026, the game has changed. The focus has shifted from “Efficiency (Volume)” to “Efficacy (Trust)”.
[...]
I gathered the critical shifts in content strategy and copywriting for IT companies this year, and how you need to adjust.
